panels.title: 🕳 Tick Gap Detector — Mã đã Subscribe không có trade > 60s
panels.description: Chỉ giám sát các mã đang subscribe theo pipeline_config (board G1, VN30/VN100/HNX30 + FU, status NO_HALT/NRM). Nếu có mã đỏ trong giờ giao dịch = producer không nhận được tick cho mã đó.

targets.rawSql:
WITH time_calc AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE
      WHEN (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time < '09:00' THEN date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') + INTERVAL '9 hours'
      WHEN (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '11:30' AND '13:00' THEN date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') + INTERVAL '11 hours 30 minutes'
      WHEN (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time >= '14:45' THEN date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') + INTERVAL '14 hours 45 minutes'
      ELSE NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh'
    END AS ref_time
),
subscribed AS (
  -- Mirror SymbolResolver DB-mode query (pipeline_config defaults):
  -- board_id=G1, status=NO_HALT, admin=NRM, sanction=NRM
  -- selection: index_name IN (VN30) OR security_group_id=FU
  SELECT DISTINCT sd.symbol
  FROM security_definition sd
  JOIN instrument_master im
    ON sd.symbol = im.symbol
   AND sd.market_id = im.market_id
  WHERE sd.trading_date = CURRENT_DATE
    AND sd.board_id = 'G1'
    AND sd.security_status = 'NO_HALT'
    AND sd.admin_status = 'NRM'
    AND sd.trading_sanction_status = 'NRM'
    AND im.is_active = true
    AND (
      im.security_group_id = 'FU'
      OR im.index_name ~ '(^|,)(VN30)(,|$)'
    )
),
last_tick AS (
  SELECT symbol, MAX(exchange_ts) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' AS last_trade
  FROM market_trade
  WHERE is_backfill = false AND exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
  GROUP BY symbol
)
SELECT
  a.symbol AS "Symbol",
  COALESCE(to_char(l.last_trade, 'HH24:MI:SS'), 'Chưa có tick hôm nay') AS "Tick Cuối (ICT)",
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tc.ref_time - l.last_trade))::numeric, 0) AS "Giây Không Có Tick"
FROM subscribed a
CROSS JOIN time_calc tc
LEFT JOIN last_tick l ON a.symbol = l.symbol
WHERE
  (l.last_trade IS NULL OR tc.ref_time - l.last_trade > INTERVAL '60 seconds')
ORDER BY "Giây Không Có Tick" DESC NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 50

panels.title: 📊 Inter-Message Gap theo Symbol (ms)
panels.description: Khoảng cách thời gian (ms) giữa 2 tick liên tiếp của cùng 1 symbol. Spike cao = gián đoạn dữ liệu từ sàn hoặc producer bị treo. Dùng threshold đỏ để xác định gap đáng ngờ.

targets.rawSql:
WITH gaps AS (
  SELECT
    symbol,
    exchange_ts,
    LAG(exchange_ts) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY exchange_ts, session_vol) AS prev_ts,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
      exchange_ts - LAG(exchange_ts) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY exchange_ts, session_vol)
    )) * 1000 AS gap_ms
  FROM market_trade
  WHERE is_backfill = false AND $__timeFilter(exchange_ts)
)
SELECT
  time_bucket('1 minute', exchange_ts) AS time,
  symbol AS metric,
  ROUND(MAX(gap_ms)::numeric, 0) AS value
FROM gaps
WHERE gap_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND gap_ms > 60000
  -- Bỏ qua gap sinh ra do nghỉ trưa (tick đầu tiên lúc 13:00 trừ tick cuối lúc 11:30)
  AND NOT (
    (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time >= '13:00:00'
    AND (prev_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time <= '11:30:59'
  )
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📦 Volume Delta Anomaly — Tick bị miss (session_vol nhảy bất thường)
panels.description: Phát hiện tick bị mất thầm lặng: delta session_vol giữa 2 tick liên tiếp lớn hơn 3× quantity của tick hiện tại = có volume không giải thích được = tick bị miss ở giữa. Nguy hiểm hơn gap thông thường vì WebSocket vẫn connected.

targets.rawSql:
WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    symbol,
    market_id,
    exchange_ts,
    price,
    quantity,
    session_vol,
    session_vol - LAG(session_vol) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY exchange_ts, session_vol) AS vol_delta,
    LAG(session_vol)         OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY exchange_ts, session_vol) AS prev_session_vol,
    LAG(exchange_ts)         OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY exchange_ts, session_vol) AS prev_ts
  FROM market_trade
  WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
    AND session_vol IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  symbol                                                              AS "Symbol",
  market_id                                                           AS "Sàn",
  to_char(exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Thời gian",
  quantity                                                            AS "Qty Tick Này",
  vol_delta                                                           AS "Delta Vol",
  ROUND((vol_delta::numeric / NULLIF(quantity, 0)), 1)                AS "Bội số (×qty)",
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (exchange_ts - prev_ts))::numeric, 1)      AS "Gap trước (s)"
FROM deltas
WHERE vol_delta > quantity * 3
  AND prev_session_vol IS NOT NULL
  AND quantity > 0
ORDER BY exchange_ts DESC
LIMIT 50

defaults.noValue: ✅ Không có tick bị miss trong 6 giờ qua

panels.title: 🚨 Price Anomaly — Giá vượt Trần/Sàn từ Security Definition
panels.description: Giao dịch có giá nằm ngoài giới hạn trần/sàn theo Security Definition. Phát hiện lỗi parse dữ liệu hoặc dữ liệu sai từ nguồn.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  t.symbol                                                              AS "Symbol",
  t.price                                                               AS "Giá GD",
  sd.ceiling_price                                                      AS "Trần",
  sd.floor_price                                                        AS "Sàn",
  CASE
    WHEN t.price > sd.ceiling_price THEN '🔴 Vượt Trần'
    WHEN t.price < sd.floor_price   THEN '🔵 Dưới Sàn'
  END                                                                   AS "Loại",
  to_char(t.exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Thời gian"
FROM market_trade t
JOIN security_definition sd
  ON t.symbol     = sd.symbol
  AND t.market_id  = sd.market_id
  AND sd.trading_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::date
WHERE t.exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
  AND sd.ceiling_price IS NOT NULL
  AND (t.price > sd.ceiling_price OR t.price < sd.floor_price)
ORDER BY t.exchange_ts DESC
LIMIT 50

defaults.noValue: ✅ Không có giá bất thường hôm nay

panels.title: 📉 Spread Anomaly — order_book_l2 (Spread âm hoặc bất thường)
panels.description: Spread âm (ask < bid) = lỗi parse nghiêm trọng. Spread > 10% giá bid = quote bất thường, có thể do sàn gửi thiếu level hoặc producer parse sai field.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  symbol                                                                AS "Symbol",
  market_id                                                             AS "Sàn",
  to_char(exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh', 'HH24:MI:SS')   AS "Thời gian",
  ROUND(bid_price1::numeric, 2)                                         AS "Bid",
  ROUND(ask_price1::numeric, 2)                                         AS "Ask",
  ROUND(spread::numeric, 2)                                             AS "Spread",
  CASE
    WHEN spread < 0                          THEN '🔴 Spread Âm'
    WHEN spread > bid_price1 * 0.1           THEN '🟡 Spread > 10%'
  END                                                                   AS "Loại"
FROM order_book_l2
WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
  AND bid_price1 IS NOT NULL
  AND ask_price1 IS NOT NULL
  AND bid_price1 > 0
  AND (spread < 0 OR spread > bid_price1 * 0.1)
  AND (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time NOT BETWEEN '08:45:00' AND '08:45:05'
  AND (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time NOT BETWEEN '09:00:00' AND '09:00:05'
ORDER BY exchange_ts DESC
LIMIT 50

defaults.noValue: ✅ Không có spread bất thường trong ngày hôm nay

panels.title: 📉 Tỷ lệ Null/Zero Bid-Ask — order_book_l2
panels.description: % record có bid_price1 hoặc ask_price1 bị null/zero. Tăng đột biến = lỗi parse hoặc sàn gửi dữ liệu thiếu.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', exchange_ts) AS time,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bid_price1 IS NULL OR bid_price1 = 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS "Null Bid %",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ask_price1 IS NULL OR ask_price1 = 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS "Null Ask %"
FROM order_book_l2
WHERE $__timeFilter(exchange_ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📊 Độ phủ Session OHLCV — Mã theo ATO/Liên tục/ATC
panels.description: Số tick mỗi symbol nhận được trong ATO (09:00-09:15), giờ liên tục và ATC (14:30-15:00). Symbols có 0 tick = không subscribe hoặc mã không giao dịch hôm nay.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  symbol                                                                                                      AS "Symbol",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '09:00' AND '09:15')     AS "ATO Ticks",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '09:15' AND '14:30')     AS "Liên Tục Ticks",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time BETWEEN '14:30' AND '15:00')     AS "ATC Ticks",
  COUNT(*)                                                                                                     AS "Tổng Hôm Nay",
  ROUND(MIN(price)::numeric, 2)                                                                               AS "Low",
  ROUND(MAX(price)::numeric, 2)                                                                               AS "High"
FROM market_trade
WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')
GROUP BY symbol
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY "Tổng Hôm Nay" ASC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: 🩺 Thống Kê Chất Lượng & Bất Thường

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol)::double precision FROM market_trade WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')) AS "Symbols có tick",
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision FROM market_trade WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')) AS "Tổng trade ticks",
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision FROM market_trade t JOIN security_definition sd ON t.symbol = sd.symbol AND t.market_id = sd.market_id AND sd.trading_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::date WHERE t.exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AND sd.ceiling_price IS NOT NULL AND (t.price > sd.ceiling_price OR t.price < sd.floor_price)) AS "Anomaly giá",
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision FROM (
    SELECT session_vol - LAG(session_vol) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY exchange_ts, session_vol) AS vol_delta, quantity
    FROM market_trade
    WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AND session_vol IS NOT NULL
  ) sub WHERE vol_delta > quantity * 3 AND quantity > 0) AS "Vol Delta Anomaly",
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision FROM order_book_l2 WHERE exchange_ts >= (date_trunc('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') AND bid_price1 IS NOT NULL AND bid_price1 > 0 AND (spread < 0 OR spread > bid_price1 * 0.1) AND (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time NOT BETWEEN '08:45:00' AND '08:45:05' AND (exchange_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh')::time NOT BETWEEN '09:00:00' AND '09:00:05') AS "Spread Anomaly"
